india_trends.title: India banks’ credit growth seen outpacing deposits in FY27: Analysts
india_trends.summary: Bank credit growth is set to outpace deposit expansion in fiscal 2027. Analysts predict credit will grow 12-14% while deposits rise 10-12%. This trend follows a pattern where credit has consistently grown faster than deposits for over a decade. Revised liquidity norms may help manage this gap. Decli
